item.title: 春季启动 | 最大限度地使用 SWAGGER — 分组/定义/标签 | Spring Boot | Using SWAGGER at maximum — Grouping/Definition/Tag
item.description:
主要文章将所有内容捆绑在一起并重定向到可以在 swagger UI 中实现的不同功能，如下所示： medium.com/@stefan.paladuta17/spring-bo ...

在本文中，我将展示如何在 swagger UI 中实现分组/定义/标签。

为什么要费心在应用程序中实现分组？

  1. 也许您有一个公开大量端点的应用程序，这意味着您可能有开发人员想要对它们进行逻辑分组。
  2. 也许您的应用程序包含大量控制器，这些控制器将所有内容捆绑在一起太紧（从 SWAGGER UI 的角度来看），并且应该应用分离。
  3. 也许您有一个作为整体呈现的应用程序，并为不同的组/团队公开大量的 Web 服务。 在这种情况下，您可能希望根据暴露的对象对它们进行划分，以便通过 swagger 生成的 UI 不会太大且令人困惑，而是直接关注特定的消费者群体。
  4. 对 api 进行分类。

我们首先创建 Docket。 在我的例子中，我创建了 2 个 docket bean，用于 2 个组（地址和会计）：

 package ro.stefan.config; import org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean; import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration; import springfox.documentation.builders.PathSelectors; import springfox.documentation.builders.RequestHandlerSelectors; import springfox.documentation.spi.DocumentationType; import springfox.documentation.spring.web.plugins.Docket; @Configuration public class SpringFoxConfig { @Bean public Docket api1() { return new Docket(DocumentationType.SWAGGER_2) .groupName("address") .select() .apis(RequestHandlerSelectors.basePackage("ro.stefan.external.apis.address")) .paths(PathSelectors.any()) .build(); } @Bean public Docket api2() { return new Docket(DocumentationType.SWAGGER_2) .groupName("accounting") .select() .apis(RequestHandlerSelectors.basePackage("ro.stefan.external.apis.accounting")) .paths(PathSelectors.any()) .build(); } }

项目的布局如下（也可以直接通过我的github repo看到。附在文章末尾）：

在这个布局中，我们有 2 个基本控制器（ AccountingController和AddressController ），其中只有返回 null 的方法，这些方法只是为了 POC（概念验证）而放在那里。 结果：

我们可以看到生成 UI swagger 在选择定义组合框中有我们的 2 个组。

使用标签更有趣，这里我们没有更多的定义（组合框），但我们定义了适当的端点分组。 首先我从分享 Docket 代码开始：

 package ro.stefan.config; import org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean; import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration; import springfox.documentation.builders.ApiInfoBuilder; import springfox.documentation.builders.PathSelectors; import springfox.documentation.builders.RequestHandlerSelectors; import springfox.documentation.service.ApiInfo; import springfox.documentation.service.Contact; import springfox.documentation.service.Tag; import springfox.documentation.spi.DocumentationType; import springfox.documentation.spring.web.plugins.Docket; @Configuration public class SpringFoxConfig { @Bean public Docket api3() { // here tags is optional, it just adds a description in the UI // by default description is class name, so if you use same tag using // `@Api` on different classes it will pick one of the class name as // description, so better define your own description for them return new Docket(DocumentationType.SWAGGER_2) .apiInfo(apiInfo()) .tags(new Tag("security", "security related"), new Tag("loan", "loan related")) .select() .apis(RequestHandlerSelectors.basePackage("ro.stefan.external.apis")) .paths(PathSelectors.any()) .build(); } private ApiInfo apiInfo() { return new ApiInfoBuilder() .title("Openapi OAS3 with springfox ") .description("Code first approach") .version("1.0.0") .contact(new Contact("Stefan", "https://test.com", "test@test.com")) .build(); } }

该项目的布局如下：


 @RestController public class AccountingController { @GetMapping("/accounts") public List<String> getAccounts(){ return null; } } /* ----------------------- */ @RestController public class AddressController { @GetMapping("/addresses") public List<String> getAddresses(){ return null; } } /* ----------------------- */ @RestController @Api(tags = "loan") public class LoanController { @GetMapping("/loan") public String getLoanDetails() { return null; } } /* ----------------------- */ @RestController @Api(tags = "security") public class SecurityController { @GetMapping("/user") public String getUser() { return null; } }

在此布局中，我们有 4 个基本控制器，其中只有一个返回 null 的方法，但放在那里只是为了 POC（概念验证）和结果

有趣的是，通过在 2 个控制器上添加必要的注释 @Tag，我们刚刚解锁了更改组名称和描述的功能。

我们可以看到，没有用 @Tag 注释的 2 个控制器是自动生成的名称（计费控制器和地址控制器），并且用 @Tag 注释的 2 个控制器的命名和描述与我们在 Docket 中编写的一样。代码。

可以在多个标签下进行操作，但不能在标签下进行操作。

结论：分组 API 的概念并不是 Java 所特有的，如果您想看到适用于 .NET Core、C# 的相同原则，我鼓励您遵循： www.mattruma.com/adventures-in-apis-gro…

如果你想要我的代码，你可以在这里找到它： github.com/Kanames/SpringBoot-SwaggerEx…

如果您喜欢这篇文章，请花一点时间给我鼓掌👏，甚至请我喝杯咖啡www.buymeacoffee.com/stefansplace (;

参考：
medium.com/p/2b25eb39a0cb medium.com/p/2b25eb39a0cb



原文:

The main article that bundles all together and redirect to different features that you can implement in swagger UI is present here: medium.com/@stefan.paladuta17/spring-bo…

In this article I am going to show how grouping/definitions/tags can be achieved in swagger UI.

Why should you bother to implement grouping in your application ?

  1. Maybe you have an application that exposes a ton of endpoints and that means you may have developers that want to group them logically.
  2. Maybe you have an application that has a ton of controllers that together, bundles the everything too tight (from an SWAGGER UI point of view) and separation should be applied.
  3. Maybe you have an application that is presented as a monolith and exposes a ton of web services for different groups/teams. In this case you may want to divide them based for who they are exposed so that the UI generate via swagger won’t be huge and confusing but instead be directly focused on specific group of consumers.
  4. Categorizing apis.

1 — Using GROUPS

We create first the Docket’s. In my case I create 2 docket bean’s that will be for 2 groups (address and accounting):

package ro.stefan.config;

import org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;
import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;

import springfox.documentation.builders.PathSelectors;
import springfox.documentation.builders.RequestHandlerSelectors;
import springfox.documentation.spi.DocumentationType;
import springfox.documentation.spring.web.plugins.Docket;

@Configuration
public class SpringFoxConfig {

    @Bean
    public Docket api1() {
        return new Docket(DocumentationType.SWAGGER_2)
                .groupName("address")
                .select()
                .apis(RequestHandlerSelectors.basePackage("ro.stefan.external.apis.address"))
                .paths(PathSelectors.any())
                .build();
    }


    @Bean
    public Docket api2() {
        return new Docket(DocumentationType.SWAGGER_2)
                .groupName("accounting")
                .select()
                .apis(RequestHandlerSelectors.basePackage("ro.stefan.external.apis.accounting"))
                .paths(PathSelectors.any())
                .build();
    }


}

the layout of the project is the following (also can be seen directly via my github repo. attached at the end of the article):

in this layout we have 2 basic controllers ( AccountingController and AddressController ) with just methods that return null that are put there just for the POC (Proof Of Concept). And the result:

we can see that the generate UI swagger has in the Select definition comboBox our 2 groups.

2 — Using TAGS

Using Tags it’s more interesting, here we don’t have anymore definitions (the combo box) but we define a proper grouping of endpoint. First I start with sharing the Docket code:

package ro.stefan.config;

import org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;
import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;

import springfox.documentation.builders.ApiInfoBuilder;
import springfox.documentation.builders.PathSelectors;
import springfox.documentation.builders.RequestHandlerSelectors;
import springfox.documentation.service.ApiInfo;
import springfox.documentation.service.Contact;
import springfox.documentation.service.Tag;
import springfox.documentation.spi.DocumentationType;
import springfox.documentation.spring.web.plugins.Docket;

@Configuration
public class SpringFoxConfig {


    @Bean
    public Docket api3() {
        // here tags is optional, it just adds a description in the UI
        // by default description is class name, so if you use same tag using 
        // `@Api` on different classes it will pick one of the class name as 
        // description, so better define your own description for them
        return new Docket(DocumentationType.SWAGGER_2)
                .apiInfo(apiInfo())
                .tags(new Tag("security", "security related"), 
                          new Tag("loan", "loan related"))
                .select()
                .apis(RequestHandlerSelectors.basePackage("ro.stefan.external.apis"))
                .paths(PathSelectors.any())
                .build();
    }

    private ApiInfo apiInfo() {
        return new ApiInfoBuilder()
                .title("Openapi OAS3 with springfox ")
                .description("Code first approach")
                .version("1.0.0")
                .contact(new Contact("Stefan", "https://test.com", "test@test.com"))
                .build();
    }

}

the layout of the project is the following:


@RestController
public class AccountingController {

    @GetMapping("/accounts")
    public List<String> getAccounts(){
        return null;
    }
}
/* ----------------------- */
@RestController
public class AddressController {

    @GetMapping("/addresses")
    public List<String> getAddresses(){
        return null;
    }
}
/* ----------------------- */
@RestController
@Api(tags = "loan")
public class LoanController {

    @GetMapping("/loan")
    public String getLoanDetails() {
        return null;
    }
}
/* ----------------------- */
@RestController
@Api(tags = "security")
public class SecurityController {
    @GetMapping("/user")
    public String getUser() {
        return null;
    }
}

in this layout we have 4 basic controllers with just a method that return null but put there just for the POC (Proof Of Concept) and the result

Interesting, so by putting on 2 controllers the necessary annotation @Tag we just unlocked the power to change also the name of the group and the description.

We can see that 2 controllers that aren’t annotated with the @Tag are auto-generated their names (accounting-controller and address-controller) and the 2 controllers that we annotated with @Tag are named and descripted as we written in the Docket code.

You can have operations under multiple tags, but not tags under tags.

Conclusion: The concept of grouping API’s is not something specific to java here I encourage you to follow if you want to see the same principle applied for .NET Core, C#: www.mattruma.com/adventures-in-apis-gro…

If you want my code you can find it here: github.com/Kanames/SpringBoot-SwaggerEx…

If you liked the article please take a minute to offer me a clap 👏 or even buy me a coffee www.buymeacoffee.com/stefansplace (;

References:
medium.com/p/2b25eb39a0cb
item.author: kanames

item.title: 如何使用 SoapUI 和 Python Zeep 来使用 SOAP/WSDL API | How to use SOAP/WSDL APIs using SoapUI & Python Zeep
item.description:
在我们的敏捷/移动/“现代”和前/后生活中，我们看到很多 REST API。 如果您了解 HTTP、GET、Post 等，那么使用 REST 就很简单了。
但在企业级别，您将开始看到基于 SOAP 和 WSDL 的 API，它们看起来更令人困惑。 为什么？ 因为它们是在设计时考虑到的机器，有时 WSDL 文件被视为文档，而您不会获得人类可读的文档！
不用担心...WSDL 拥有您使用 API 所需的一切。 在这篇文章中，我将向您展示如何操作！ 使用 SoapUI 和 Zeep python 库。

胡安·路易斯·卡诺·罗德里格斯 - 5 月 25 日

一旦解除暂停，jadijadi 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，jadijadi 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己才能访问。

如果 jadijadi 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从仪表板重新发布帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保证 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记 jadijadi：

使 jadijadi 的所有帖子不那么明显

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 jadijadi 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

In our Agile / Mobile / "moderm" and fron/back life, we see lots of REST APIs. Using REST is straight forward if you know your HTTP, GET, Post, ...
But on the enterprise level, you will start seein SOAP and WSDL based APIs which look more confusing. Why? Because they are designed machines in mind and sometimes WSDL file is seen as the documentation and you wont get a human readable doc!
No worries... WSDL has whatever you need to work with your APIs. In this Post I'll show you how! Using SoapUI and the Zeep python library.

Juan Luis Cano Rodríguez - May 25

item.title: 为什么应该从 C++ 开始您的技术之旅 | Why you should start your tech journey with C++
item.description:
科技领域是一个快节奏、不断发展的领域，吸引着无数年轻而充满活力的知识分子的心。 有大量的编程语言可供选择，每种语言都有其特定的目的和应用，有抱负的软件工程师经常考虑选择哪种语言开始他们的旅程。 在这种背景下，C++ 由于其广泛性、酷性以及作为面向对象编程语言的地位而成为一个引人注目的选择。 尽管被标记为最具挑战性的语言之一，但澄清对 C++ 的误解并理解为什么它是您技术之旅的绝佳起点至关重要。

是的，所以这些是我应该从 C++ 开始的原因：

它适用于各个领域，包括系统编程、游戏开发、嵌入式系统和高性能计算。 其将低级控制与高级抽象相结合的能力使开发人员能够编写高效且可扩展的代码，从而在资源受限的环境中提供最佳性能。

通过使用 C++ 开始您的技术之旅，您可以在面向对象编程 (OOP) 方面打下坚实的基础。 这些概念构成了现代软件工程实践的支柱，使您能够构建模块化、可维护和可重用的代码。

学习 C++ 将为您提供超越语言本身的可转移技能。 因此，熟练掌握 C++ 为更有效地学习其他语言奠定了基础，使您能够适应不同的技术环境并蓬勃发展。

它对手动内存管理和直接硬件访问的支持使您可以微调代码的关键部分以获得最大效率。 通过了解低级复杂性并实施高效的算法，您可以创建速度极快且资源高效的应用程序。

在技​​术领域，您会经常遇到用 C++ 编写的遗留系统和代码库。 从头开始学习 C++ 将使您能够理解和增强现有代码库，从而提供宝贵的职业机会。 此外，通过掌握 C++，您可以培养弥合遗留系统和现代技术之间差距的技能，确保无缝互操作性和平滑的迁移路径。

总之，使用 C++ 开始您的技术之旅有很多好处。 它为面向对象编程奠定了坚实的基础，为您提供可转移的技能，使您能够优化代码性能，并为您使用遗留系统做好准备。 虽然 C++ 可能被认为具有挑战性，但将其作为您的第一语言可以让您克服障碍并更深入地了解编程概念。 因此，抓住机会，利用 C++ 开启您的技术之旅，并在不断发展的技术领域开启充满无限可能的世界。

注意：要下载 copiller代码块，请单击此处 [ www.codeblocks.org/downloads/ ]

PS : I will advice after learning the basics of C++ and working on few beginer projects move quickly to learn python programming language. PS ：在学习了 C++ 基础知识并参与了一些入门项目后，我会建议快速学习 python 编程语言。



原文:

The tech field is a fast-paced and ever-evolving realm that captivates the hearts of numerous young and vibrant intellectuals. With a plethora of programming languages to choose from, each with its specific purpose and application, aspiring software engineers often ponder which language to embark upon their journey. In this context, C++ emerges as a compelling choice due to its vastness, coolness, and status as an object-oriented programming language. Despite being labeled as one of the most challenging languages, it is crucial to debunk misconceptions surrounding C++ and understand why it is an excellent starting point for your tech journey.

Yes, so these are my reasons you should start with C++:

1. Unparalleled Versatility:
C++ offers unparalleled versatility, making it an invaluable language to master. It finds application across various domains, including systems programming, game development, embedded systems, and high-performance computing. Its ability to combine low-level control with high-level abstractions enables developers to write efficient and scalable code, delivering optimal performance in resource-constrained environments.

2. Strong Foundation in Object-Oriented Programming:
By starting your tech journey with C++, you establish a strong foundation in object-oriented programming (OOP). C++ embodies the principles of OOP, allowing you to grasp fundamental concepts like classes, objects, inheritance, and polymorphism. These concepts form the backbone of modern software engineering practices, enabling you to build modular, maintainable, and reusable code.

3. Transferable Skills:
Learning C++ equips you with transferable skills that transcend the language itself. The syntax and features of C++ have influenced numerous subsequent programming languages, such as Java, C#, and Python. As a result, proficiency in C++ lays the groundwork for learning other languages more effectively, enabling you to adapt and thrive in diverse technological landscapes.

4. Performance Optimization:
C++ empowers you to optimize code performance, a crucial skill in the tech industry. Its support for manual memory management and direct hardware access allows you to fine-tune critical sections of your code for maximum efficiency. By understanding low-level intricacies and implementing efficient algorithms, you can create blazingly fast and resource-efficient applications.

5. Legacy Code Maintenance:
In the tech field, you will frequently encounter legacy systems and codebases written in C++. Learning C++ from the start equips you with the ability to comprehend and enhance existing codebases, providing valuable career opportunities. Moreover, by mastering C++, you develop the skills to bridge the gap between legacy systems and modern technologies, ensuring seamless interoperability and smooth migration paths.

In conclusion, starting your tech journey with C++ offers a multitude of benefits. It provides a solid foundation in object-oriented programming, equips you with transferable skills, empowers you to optimize code performance, and prepares you for working with legacy systems. While C++ may be perceived as challenging, embracing it as your first language allows you to overcome obstacles and gain a deeper understanding of programming concepts. So, seize the opportunity to embark on your tech journey with C++, and unlock a world of possibilities in the ever-evolving field of technology.

Note: to download the copiller codeblocks click here [www.codeblocks.org/downloads/]

PS: I will advice after learning the basics of C++ and working on few beginer projects move quickly to learn python programming language.
item.author: jerryking_175

item.title: 使用 Git Bash 将 HTML 文件推送到 GitHub | Pushing HTML files to GitHub using Git Bash
item.description:
约瑟夫·伊格维

发布于 7 月 1 日

在本文中，您将学习如何创建一个简单的网站并使用 GitBash 推送到 GitHub。 作为开发人员，GitBash 是一个终端，您可以在其中保存代码并供以后部署使用。
要求

  1. 在本地计算机上下载 Git Bash。
  2. 注册 GitHub 帐户流程

在本地计算机上，打开 git Bash 并等待 shell 提示符显示，要开始，请键入以下命令：

git config --global user.name "your username" git config --global user.email "your email"


创建一个目录并初始化它。

  1. 要创建新目录，请使用以下命令： mkdir "directory name"
  2. 打开新创建的目录cd "directory name" git init

  1. 使用命令 touch index.html 创建文件index.html
  2. 要在新文件中添加内容，请输入 vi index.html，在新窗口中，按键盘上的 i 来编辑和添加内容。

  1. 完成后，按 esc 键和 :wq 保存并退出。

创建存储库

  1. 登录到您的 GitHub 帐户，在仪表板上，通过带有下拉箭头的 + 图标，然后选择创建新存储库。

  1. 在打开的新窗口中，输入存储库的名称，然后输入确保选中“添加自述文件”。

  1. 单击创建存储库按钮

  1. 在打开的窗口中，单击代码按钮，在 HTTPS 下复制地址。 克隆您的存储库在 Git bash 窗口中，键入命令： git remote add origin "Paste the URL of the GITHUB here" ，然后按 Enter 键。 暂存并提交文件
  2. 要暂存文件，请键入命令： git add "name of your file"
  3. 要提交，请输入命令： git commit -m "A message of your choice" 。 提交消息是您选择的任何内容。


将您的文件推送到 GITHUB
要将文件从本地计算机推送到 GitHub，我们使用命令： git push origin master
如果您是第一次这样做，可能需要您进行身份验证。

从上图中我们可以看到我们的index.html文件已经成功推送到GitHub了。

查看 GITHUB 上的内容


在 GitHub 仪表板左侧的“热门存储库”下，选择您在本课程中创建的存储库。 窗口打开后，单击“比较并拉取请求”按钮

点击Master，文件Index.html


总之，我们已成功将远程文件index.html推送到GitHub。 乔纳森·费特罗夫 - 6 月 30 日

一旦被暂停，josephigwe2022 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到其暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，josephigwe2022 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，josephigwe2022 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己才能访问。

如果 josephigwe2022 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从仪表板重新发布帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保证 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记 josephigwe2022：

使 josephigwe2022 的所有帖子不那么明显

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 josephigwe2022 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Joseph Igwe

Posted on Jul 1

In this article , you will learn how to create a simple website and push to GitHub using a GitBash. As a developer, GitBash is a terminal , a place where you can keep your codes and use later for future deployment.
REQUIREMENTS

  1. Download Git Bash on your local machine.
  2. Sign up to a GitHub account Procedures

On your local machine ,open your git Bash and wait for the shell prompt to display, To Begin ,type the following commands:

git config --global user.name "your username" git config --global user.email "your email"


"
CREATE A DIRECTORY AND INITIALIZE IT.

  1. To make a new directory use this command: mkdir "directory name"
  2. To open the new created directory cd "directory name" git init

  1. Create a file index.html using command touch index.html
  2. To add content in the new file type vi index.html, In the new window, press i on you keyboard to edit and add content.

  1. When done ,press esc key and :wq , to save and exit.

CREATING A REPOSITORY

  1. Login to your GitHub account ,on the dashboard ,by the + icon with a dropdown arrow and select create new repository.

  1. In the new window opened, enter a name for your repository, and enter ensure to checkbox the "Add Readme file".

  1. Click the create Repository button

  1. On the window that opens, click on the Code button, Under HTTPS copy the address. CLONING YOUR REPOSITORY On your Git bash window, type the command :git remote add origin "Paste the URL of the GITHUB here" and press Enter key. STAGING AND COMMITING THE FILE
  2. To stage your files type the command: git add "name of your file"
  3. To commit type the command:git commit -m "A message of your choice". The commit message is anything of your choice.


PUSHING YOUR FILES TO GITHUB
To push files from your local machine to GitHub, we use the command: git push origin master
If you are doing it for the first time authentication may be required from you.

From the above diagram, we can see that our index.html file has been pushed successfully to GitHub.

VIEWING CONTENT ON GITHUB


On GitHub dashboard, at your left-hand side, under Top Repositories, select the repository you created in this lesson. When the window opens, click the button "Compare and pull Request"

Click on the Master ,the file Index.html


In conclusion, we have successfully pushed our remote file ,index.html to GitHub. GitHub , bitbucket are trusted developer sites where our codes can be stored.

Jonathan Fetterolf - Jun 30

Once suspended, josephigwe2022 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, josephigwe2022 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by josephigwe2022 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If josephigwe2022 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag josephigwe2022:

Make all posts by josephigwe2022 less visible

josephigwe2022 consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging josephigwe2022 will restore default visibility to their posts.

item.title: Hyper-V 和量子计算：探索未来技术的协同作用 | Hyper-V and Quantum Computing: Exploring the Synergy of Future Technologies
item.description:
介绍

随着我们进一步探索未来，新兴技术将继续重塑数字格局，突破可能性的界限。 在这些突破性技术中，量子计算作为潜在的游戏规则改变者脱颖而出。 量子计算利用量子力学的力量以前所未有的规模执行计算，开辟了计算能力的新领域。 在本文中，我们将探讨 Microsoft 虚拟化平台 Hyper-V 和量子计算之间令人兴奋的协同作用，重点介绍它们提供的潜在优势和应用程序。

量子虚拟化：释放新的可能性

由于量子计算巨大的计算能力，包括材料科学、药物发现和密码学在内的许多行业都可以彻底改变。 然而，要有效利用这种能力，需要强大的虚拟化基础设施。 凭借其在虚拟化方面的专业知识，Hyper-V 可以通过提供量子虚拟化方法为量子计算做出重大贡献。 这些方法可以实现量子应用的资源管理、量子环境之间的安全隔离以及量子资源的有效分配。

使用 Hyper-V 的量子辅助计算

企业可以利用量子辅助计算，因为 Hyper-V 可以毫无问题地与量子计算平台集成。 量子计算的独特功能与量子辅助计算中经典计算的优势相结合，产生了可以处理困难计算问题的混合模型。 由于 Hyper-V 与量子计算平台的集成，提供了统一的接口来编排量子计算资源与传统计算资源，从而实现混合量子经典环境的配置和管理。

量子安全加密和安全

随着量子计算机的进步，它们对传统密码系统构成了潜在威胁。 量子计算的卓越计算能力可能能够击败当前的加密技术，从而暴露机密信息。 然而，通过将 Hyper-V 与量子计算相结合，量子安全加密和安全机制是可能的。 这些抗量子加密算法和安全协议可确保数据免受量子对手的攻击，从而在量子驱动的计算环境中保持信息的机密性和完整性。

量子建模、仿真和优化

量子计算处理大量数据和执行复杂计算的能力为建模、模拟和优化提供了新的机会。 为了帮助研究人员和组织更好地理解量子现象、模拟量子系统并简化复杂流程，Hyper-V 可以帮助部署和管理量子建模和模拟环境。 借助 Hyper-V 和量子计算之间的协同作用，科学家和工程师可以推进材料科学、改善供应链并解决具有挑战性的优化问题。

使用 Hyper-V 的量子云计算

鉴于云计算已发展成为计算的重要范式，将量子计算集成到云基础设施中是顺理成章的发展。 由于Hyper-V强大的虚拟化能力，量子云计算成为可能，因为量子资源是作为更大的云生态系统的一部分来配置和管理的。 通过这种集成，企业和学术机构可以立即获得量子计算的巨大计算能力，从而实现量子驱动的商品和服务的开发以及协作量子研究。

结论

随着这些技术的发展，Hyper-V 和量子计算之间的相互作用将影响计算的方向，使企业和研究人员能够解决难题并开辟新的创新途径。



原文:

Introduction

As we venture further into the future, emerging technologies continue to reshape the digital landscape, pushing the boundaries of what is possible. Among these groundbreaking technologies, quantum computing stands out as a potential game-changer. Quantum computing harnesses the power of quantum mechanics to perform computations at an unprecedented scale, opening up new frontiers in computational capabilities. In this article, we will explore the exciting synergy between Hyper-V, Microsoft's virtualization platform, and quantum computing, highlighting the potential benefits and applications they offer.

Quantum Virtualization: Unleashing New Possibilities

Numerous industries, including material science, drug discovery, and cryptography, could be completely transformed thanks to quantum computing's enormous computational power. However, a strong virtualization infrastructure is necessary to effectively harness this power. With its expertise in virtualization, Hyper-V can contribute significantly to quantum computing by offering quantum virtualization methods. These methods enable resource management for quantum applications, secure isolation between quantum environments, and efficient allocation of quantum resources.

Quantum-Assisted Computing with Hyper-V

Businesses can take advantage of quantum-assisted computing because Hyper-V integrates with quantum computing platforms without any issues. The unique capabilities of quantum computing are combined with the strength of classical computing in quantum-assisted computing, resulting in hybrid models that can handle difficult computational problems. A unified interface is provided to orchestrate quantum computing resources alongside conventional computing resources thanks to Hyper-V's integration with quantum computing platforms, which enables the provisioning and management of hybrid quantum-classical environments.

Quantum-Safe Encryption and Security

As quantum computers advance, they pose a potential threat to traditional cryptographic systems. The superior computational power of quantum computing might be able to defeat current encryption techniques, exposing confidential information. However, by combining Hyper-V with quantum computing, quantum-safe encryption and security mechanisms are possible. These quantum-resistant encryption algorithms and security protocols ensure that data remains protected against attacks from quantum adversaries, preserving the confidentiality and integrity of information in quantum-powered computing environments.

Quantum Modeling, Simulation, and Optimization

New opportunities for modeling, simulation, and optimization are made possible by quantum computing's capacity to handle enormous amounts of data and carry out intricate calculations. In order to help researchers and organizations better understand quantum phenomena, simulate quantum systems, and streamline complex processes, Hyper-V can help with the deployment and management of quantum modeling and simulation environments. Scientists and engineers can advance material science, improve supply chains, and solve challenging optimization problems thanks to the synergy between Hyper-V and quantum computing.

Quantum Cloud Computing with Hyper-V

Given that cloud computing has developed into an essential paradigm for computing, the integration of quantum computing into cloud infrastructures is a logical development. Due to Hyper-V's strong virtualization abilities, quantum cloud computing can be made possible because quantum resources are provisioned and managed as a part of the larger cloud ecosystem. Through this integration, businesses and academic institutions can instantly access the tremendous computational power of quantum computing, enabling the development of quantum-powered goods and services as well as collaborative quantum research.

Conclusion

The fusion of Hyper-V and quantum computing is a ground-breaking partnership with enormous potential. Hyper-V's integration with quantum computing has the potential to completely alter the technological landscape in areas like quantum virtualization, quantum-assisted computing, quantum-safe encryption, and quantum modeling and simulation. The interplay between Hyper-V and quantum computing will influence the direction of computing as these technologies develop, enabling businesses and researchers to take on difficult problems and open up new avenues for innovation.
item.author: adityapratapbh1

item.title: 探索 Web3 和 Sephron 区块链：构建去中心化的未来 | Exploring Web3 and the Sephron Blockchain: Building a Decentralized Future
item.description:
介绍：
在这篇博客中，我们将深入研究Web3的概念，并探索Sephron区块链的特性和潜力。

了解 Web3：
它设想了一个更加开放、透明和以用户为中心的在线环境，使个人能够控制自己的数据、数字资产和在线身份。

它旨在提供安全、可扩展和去中心化的基础设施，用于构建去中心化应用程序（DApp）并促进智能合约功能。 以下是 Sephron 区块链的一些关键方面：

去中心化：Sephron 区块链在分布式节点网络上运行，确保没有中央机构可以控制系统。 这种去中心化的架构增强了透明度、安全性和弹性。

共识机制：Sephron 采用一种称为权益证明 (PoS) 的共识机制，其中验证者根据其在网络中的权益进行选择。 与传统的工作量证明 (PoW) 系统相比，PoS 可确保能源效率并实现更快的交易处理。

智能合约：Sephron 支持智能合约的执行，智能合约是具有预定义规则的自动执行协议。 这些合约在满足特定条件时自动执行交易，从而实现去信任和防篡改的交互。

互操作性：Sephron 区块链旨在通过与其他区块链和协议集成来促进互操作性。 这种跨链兼容性允许不同区块链网络之间的无缝通信和协作。

隐私和安全：Sephron强调隐私和安全，利用加密技术来保护用户数据和交易。 它使用户能够保留对其私钥的控制，并确保敏感信息的安全。

潜在应用：
这里有一些例子：

金融和 DeFi：Sephron 可以促进借贷、去中心化交易所等去中心化金融（DeFi）应用，提供透明、安全的无中介金融服务。

供应链管理：Sephron 的去中心化特性可以提高供应链透明度，跟踪货物的流动并验证真实性，最终减少欺诈并增加信任。

身份管理：Sephron 的区块链可以实现自我主权身份解决方案，个人可以控制自己的个人信息，并可以有选择地与受信任的实体共享这些信息。

游戏和 NFT：Sephron 的区块链可以为去中心化游戏平台以及不可替代代币 (NFT) 的创建、交易和所有权提供动力，从而提供独特的数字资产和游戏内经济。

结论：
随着 Web3 的不断发展，我们可以期待突破性的进步和变革性的应用程序能够增强个人能力并彻底改变行业。

免责声明：本博客中提供的信息仅用于教育目的，不应被视为财务或投资建议。 在做出任何投资决定之前，进行彻底的研究并寻求专业指导至关重要。



原文:

Introduction:
Web3 and blockchain technology have emerged as revolutionary forces that are transforming various industries and redefining how we interact, transact, and collaborate online. One intriguing project in the realm of Web3 is Sephron, a blockchain platform that aims to create a decentralized ecosystem. In this blog, we will delve into the concept of Web3 and explore the features and potential of the Sephron blockchain.

Understanding Web3:
Web3 refers to the next generation of the internet, enabling decentralized and peer-to-peer interactions without relying on centralized intermediaries. It envisions a more open, transparent, and user-centric online environment, empowering individuals to have control over their data, digital assets, and online identities.

Sephron Blockchain:
The Sephron blockchain is a prominent player in the Web3 landscape. It is designed to provide a secure, scalable, and decentralized infrastructure for building decentralized applications (DApps) and facilitating smart contract functionality. Here are some key aspects of the Sephron blockchain:

Decentralization: The Sephron blockchain operates on a distributed network of nodes, ensuring that no central authority has control over the system. This decentralized architecture enhances transparency, security, and resilience.

Consensus Mechanism: Sephron employs a consensus mechanism called Proof-of-Stake (PoS), where validators are chosen based on their stake in the network. PoS ensures energy efficiency and enables faster transaction processing compared to traditional Proof-of-Work (PoW) systems.

Smart Contracts: Sephron supports the execution of smart contracts, which are self-executing agreements with predefined rules. These contracts automatically execute transactions when specific conditions are met, enabling trustless and tamper-proof interactions.

Interoperability: The Sephron blockchain aims to foster interoperability by integrating with other blockchains and protocols. This cross-chain compatibility allows for seamless communication and collaboration between different blockchain networks.

Privacy and Security: Sephron emphasizes privacy and security by utilizing cryptographic techniques to protect user data and transactions. It enables users to retain control over their private keys and ensures that sensitive information remains secure.

Potential Applications:
The Sephron blockchain has the potential to revolutionize various industries and use cases. Here are a few examples:

Finance and DeFi: Sephron can facilitate decentralized finance (DeFi) applications such as lending, borrowing, and decentralized exchanges, offering transparent and secure financial services without intermediaries.

Supply Chain Management: Sephron's decentralized nature can enhance supply chain transparency, tracking the movement of goods and verifying authenticity, ultimately reducing fraud and increasing trust.

Identity Management: Sephron's blockchain can enable self-sovereign identity solutions, where individuals have control over their personal information and can selectively share it with trusted entities.

Gaming and NFTs: Sephron's blockchain can power decentralized gaming platforms and the creation, trading, and ownership of non-fungible tokens (NFTs), providing unique digital assets and in-game economies.

Conclusion:
Web3 and blockchain technology, with projects like Sephron, hold immense potential to reshape the digital landscape by fostering decentralization, trust, and innovation. The Sephron blockchain's focus on security, scalability, and interoperability makes it an exciting platform for building decentralized applications across various sectors. As Web3 continues to evolve, we can expect groundbreaking advancements and transformative applications that empower individuals and revolutionize industries.

Disclaimer: The information provided in this blog is for educational purposes only and should not be considered as financial or investment advice. It is essential to conduct thorough research and seek professional guidance before making any investment decisions.
item.author: deven16082003

item.title: 如何去掉CSS中的过滤器？ | How To Remove The Filter In CSS?
item.description:
它们允许开发人员将各种效果应用于图像、文本和背景颜色等元素。

但是，在某些情况下，您可能需要删除之前应用于元素的过滤器。

在本文中，我们将讨论如何删除 CSS 中的过滤器。

了解 CSS 过滤器

在我们讨论删除过滤器之前，我们需要了解什么是 CSS 过滤器。

这些过滤器是使用过滤器属性指定的，该属性后跟您要应用的一个或多个过滤器函数。

例如，要将模糊滤镜应用于元素，您可以使用以下 CSS：

 .my-element { filter: blur(35px); }

这会将半径为 5 像素的模糊滤镜应用于 my-element 类的元素。

删除 CSS 过滤器

要删除已应用于元素的过滤器，只需将过滤器属性设置为none即可。

例如，要从 my-element 类中删除模糊滤镜，您可以使用以下 CSS：

 .my-element { filter: none; }

这将从元素中删除过滤器，并将返回到其默认外观。

您可以使用 none 值来删除任何类型的过滤器，无论是单个过滤器还是已应用于元素的多个过滤器。

值得注意的是，设置 filter: none 将删除已应用于元素的所有过滤器。

如果您只想删除特定的过滤器，则可以使用要删除的过滤器功能的未设置值。

例如，仅从 my-element 类中删除模糊滤镜，您将使用以下 CSS：

 .my-element { filter: blur(5px) grayscale(50%) sepia(100%) brightness(150%); } .my-element { filter: unset blur; }

这只会从元素中删除模糊滤镜，同时保留其他滤镜。

结论

但是，有时您可能需要删除之前应用的过滤器。 幸运的是，删除 CSS 中的过滤器是一个简单的过程。

您可以使用 none 值从元素中删除所有过滤器，或使用 unset 值删除特定过滤器。

有了这些知识，您就可以轻松修改网页并获得所需的外观。



原文:

CSS filters are a powerful tool for enhancing the visual appeal of web pages.

They allow developers to apply various effects to elements such as images, text, and background colors, among others.

However, there may be instances when you need to remove a filter that you previously applied to an element.

In this article, we will discuss how to remove filters in CSS.

Understanding CSS Filters

Before we discuss removing filters, We need to understand what are CSS filters.

CSS filters are a set of visual effects that can be applied to elements to alter their appearance.

There are many types of filters available in CSS, including blur, brightness, contrast, grayscale, hue-rotate, invert, opacity, saturate, and sepia.

These filters are specified using the filter property, which is followed by the filter function or functions you want to apply.

For example, to apply a blur filter to an element, you would use the following CSS:

.my-element {
  filter: blur(35px);
}

This would apply a blur filter with a radius of 5 pixels to the element with the class my-element.

Removing CSS Filters

To remove a filter that has been applied to an element, you can simply set the filter property to none.

For example, to remove the blur filter from the my-element class, you would use the following CSS:

.my-element {
  filter: none;
}

This would remove the filter from the element, and it would return to its default appearance.

You can use the none value to remove any type of filter, whether it is a single filter or multiple filters that have been applied to an element.

It’s worth noting that the setting filter: none will remove all filters that have been applied to an element.

If you only want to remove a specific filter, you can use the unset value for the filter function you want to remove.

For example, remove only the blur filter from the my-element class, you would use the following CSS:

.my-element {
  filter: blur(5px) grayscale(50%) sepia(100%) brightness(150%);
}

.my-element {
  filter: unset blur;
}

This would remove only the blur filter from the element while leaving the other filters in place.

Conclusion

CSS filters are a powerful tool for creating visually stunning web pages.

However, there may be times when you need to remove a filter that you previously applied. Fortunately, removing filters in CSS is a simple process.

You can use the none value to remove all filters from an element or use the unset value to remove specific filters.

With this knowledge, you can easily modify your web pages and achieve the desired appearance.
item.author: arsalanmee

item.title: 轻松自动化您的智能合约 | Automate your smart contract Easily
item.description:
苏拉夫马吉

发布于 7 月 1 日

我找到了一种神奇的方法，无需使用 Chainlink 即可轻松实现智能合约自动化

只要跟着我的步骤👇

基本上，我想每 20 天自动销毁我的 ERC20 代币，而不需要任何人工，所以经过研究，我发现使用 chainlink 我们可以执行自动化，但这并不那么容易

但幸运的是，我发现了一个很棒的网站（ gelato ops ），它可以帮助我轻松地通过我的智能合约自动化燃烧过程。

让我向您解释一下这个过程：

首先，您需要在任何链上部署智能合约，例如以太坊、多边形等

其次，访问 gelato ops 网站，连接您的 MetaMask 并创建一个任务

您需要粘贴您部署的智能合约地址和Abi

然后从智能合约中选择您想要自动化的功能

接下来，选择您想要执行智能合约功能的时间间隔，如果您以我为例，那么我想每 20 天销毁我的 erc20 代币

之后，您需要选择付款，其中应有足够的资金来支付执行自动化的汽油费。

最后，为您的自动化任务命名并支付燃气费以启动该任务。

就这样，您已经成功自动化了您的智能合约功能

所以今天就尝试一下，祝一切顺利

一旦被暂停，souravmaji1 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到其暂停被取消。

一旦解除暂停，souravmaji1 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，souravmaji1 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己才能访问。

如果 souravmaji1 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从仪表板重新发布帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保证 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记 souravmaji1：

使 souravmaji1 的所有帖子不那么明显

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 souravmaji1 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

sourav maji

Posted on Jul 1

I have found a amazing way to automate your smart contract Easily without using Chainlink

just follow my steps 👇

Basically , I wanted to burn my ERC20 token in every 20 days automatically without any human effort so after researching I found that using chainlink we can perform the automation but it is not that easy

but luckily , I found a amazing website ( gelato ops ) which can help me to automate the burning process from my smart contract easily

Let me explain you about the process :

First you will need smart contract deployed in any chain such as Ethereum , polygon etc

Second, Go to gelato ops website connect your MetaMask and create a Task

You need to paste your deployed smart contract address and Abi

Then choose the function you want to automate from your smart contract

Next, select the time interval you want to execute your smart contract function and if you take my example then I want to burn my erc20 token in every 20 days

After that , you need to select payment where enough funds should be present to pay the gas fees for executing the automation

Finally , give a name to your automation task and pay the gas fees to start the task

That's it , you have automated your smart contract function successfully

so try it out today, all the best

Chainnodes💙🖤 - Dec 20 '22

Once suspended, souravmaji1 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, souravmaji1 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by souravmaji1 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If souravmaji1 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag souravmaji1:

Make all posts by souravmaji1 less visible

souravmaji1 consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging souravmaji1 will restore default visibility to their posts.
